label: Transparent basilisk lizard crest motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Basilisk Lizard transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a basilisk lizard crest reptile motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A basilisk lizard in swift side profile, emerald green body, bright blue-green dorsal highlights, expressive raised head crest, serrated back crest, long toes, slender running posture, warm river-forest brown markings, realistic scales, crisp silhouette, premium natural-history cutout. The crest must be unmistakable and prominent.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include full lizard body, head, crest, legs, long toes, and tail without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no dragon, no iguana, no snake, no forest landscape, no water splash, no props, no text, no watermark.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Basilisk Lizard light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Basilisk Lizard", derived from the visible basilisk lizard crest cutout reference. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible swift navigation system.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution design-system presentation, intended final crop 3840 x 2160. Clean professional product UI, no watermark.
Required visible sections with large readable labels: Morphous Basilisk Lizard, Basilisk Crest, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Charts, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract palette and interaction language from emerald green scales, blue turquoise scale spots, warm brown tail bands, river-forest bark neutrals, pale throat highlights, dark crest shadows, and fast water-running posture. The board must read as basilisk lizard crest and swift navigation, not generic green UI.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep all text short and legible.
UI coverage: icon sidebar navigation, top route bar, breadcrumbs, map-like navigation panels, primary/secondary buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, metric cards, route dashboard, line chart, bar chart, status rings, queue table rows, command palette search, empty/loading/error states, spacing scale, radius samples, borders, shadows, subtle scale texture samples.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, light mist background, emerald primary actions, turquoise focus rings, river blue chart accents, bark brown borders, fern-muted surfaces, crisp labels, swift directional motion accents inspired by crest ridges and long toes.
Constraints: no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Basilisk Lizard", no lizard horror, no dragon, no snake, no iguana, no neon-only palette, no generic purple gradients, no tiny unreadable paragraphs, no watermark.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Basilisk Lizard dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Basilisk Lizard". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible basilisk lizard crest cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution design-system presentation, intended final crop 3840 x 2160. Clean professional product UI, no watermark.
Required visible sections with large readable labels: Morphous Basilisk Lizard, Basilisk Crest, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Charts, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve the basilisk lizard system language: emerald scale active controls, turquoise blue focus and chart accents, bark brown borders, deep river-forest backgrounds, pale throat text, crest-ridge dividers, swift route navigation and dashboard panels. Must read as basilisk lizard crest and swift navigation, not generic dark green UI.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep all text short and legible.
UI coverage: icon sidebar navigation, top route bar, breadcrumbs, map-like navigation panels, primary/secondary buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, metric cards, route dashboard, line chart, bar chart, status rings, queue table rows, command palette search, empty/loading/error states, spacing scale, radius samples, borders, shadows, subtle scale texture samples.
Visual details: deep canopy and river-night surfaces, pale throat foreground, emerald controls, turquoise focus rings, river blue chart lines, bark brown dividers, amber status warnings, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls, 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid.
Constraints: no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Basilisk Lizard", no dragon, no snake, no iguana, no neon-only palette, no generic purple gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark.
